response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The audio phonetically matches the Japanese lyrics provided in the Reference JSON for the song 'Magia'. 2. JSON Usage: The Reference JSON was fully utilized for the song lyrics and translation. Manual transcription was used for the introductory dialogue. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps are tightly anchored to vocal onset. Visual events (song title and performers) are included during the instrumental intro. Aggressive truncation was applied to ensure distinct blocks for rapid lyrics and to prevent cascading delays.

subtitles.original: Oh, she's just... she's too strong! Too strong!
subtitles.english: Oh, she's just... she's too strong! Too strong!

subtitles.original: Ah! Ah! Ah! It's just so cool!
subtitles.english: Ah! Ah! Ah! It's just so cool!

subtitles.original: Magia / Lyrics & Music: 梶浦由記
subtitles.english: [Song: Magia / Lyrics & Music: Yuki Kajiura]

subtitles.original: 宝鐘マリン、兎田ぺこら、セレス・ファウナ、七詩ムメイ
subtitles.english: [Vocals: Houshou Marine, Usada Pekora, Ceres Fauna, Nanashi Mumei]

subtitles.original: いつか君が瞳に灯す愛の光が
subtitles.english: Someday, the light of love that you set aflame in your eyes
Will transcend time...
...and surely destroy one dream

subtitles.original: 確かに一つ壊すだろう
subtitles.english: of this world that hurries to its ruin.
Swallow down your hesitation.
What is it that you wish for?

subtitles.original: こんな欲深い憧れの行方に
subtitles.english: On the path of yearning as greedy as this,
will there be a transient tomorrow?
That I dreamed of when I was young,
something like the ancient magic,
with power that can break through the darkness,
I want to meet you and your smile.

subtitles.original: 怯えるこの手の中には
subtitles.english: What I hold in these frightened hands of mine
is courage made of handpicked flowers.
My feelings alone are all that I rely upon,
a wish that will awaken...
...the light.

subtitles.original: いつか君も誰かのために
subtitles.english: Someday, you will also wish for great power

subtitles.original: 強い力を望むのだろう
subtitles.english: for the sake of someone else, I suppose.
In the night when love captured your heart,

subtitles.original: 未知の言葉が生まれてくる
subtitles.english: yet unknown words are born.
If I can go without losing my way,
I don't mind if my heart is broken to pieces.

subtitles.original: いつも目の前の哀しみに
subtitles.english: I want a spell that can let me
fight against the sorrow
that is always in front of my eyes.
You are a memory that continues to dream.
I am the sleepless tomorrow.
I will move forward in order to attain

subtitles.original: 勝ち取るために進むわ
subtitles.english: the miracle of the two of us meeting.

subtitles.original: 怯えるこの手の中には
subtitles.english: What I hold in these frightened hands of mine
is a sword of handpicked flowers.

subtitles.original: 思いだけが生きる全て
subtitles.english: My feelings alone are all that I live for,
a wish that I brandish...
...within my heart.
When I used to like books about strange lands

subtitles.original: 不思議の国の本が好きだった頃
subtitles.english: illuminated by captive suns,
I believed the fairy tales that
taught us that wishes would surely...
...come true.

subtitles.original: 静かに咲き乱れていた
subtitles.english: Gently, magic from ancient times
bloomed wildly in silence.
"The power to change the world
lies in those hands of yours," it whispers.

subtitles.original: 終わらない夢を見よう
subtitles.english: Let us have an unending dream.
During this time I go through with you,

subtitles.original: 思いだけが生きる全て
subtitles.english: my feelings alone are all that I live for.
What will create my life is...
...this wish.
